### Post by kohdesmond on 2011-04-08
Hi guys,

i set up a network with IPtables in IPv4 & v6, the IPv4 table works but when i enter in the IPv6 table the whole network is down unable to contact the external network.

is there anybody know what i have done wrong ?

desmond

### Post by elico on 2011-04-08
i do understand that we are talking about the INT FW machine.
what do you mean by external network? internet? eth0 interface?

your rules are very very strict (DROP DEFAULT)
so you can try  to accept and see if everything is working.
if not then it's not iptables but other issue.

and also i do thing that in your case i would consider to also put a WEB PROXY such as squid.

---

### Post by kohdesmond on 2011-04-13
> **elico said:**
> i do understand that we are talking about the INT FW machine.
what do you mean by external network? internet? eth0 interface?

your rules are very very strict (DROP DEFAULT)
so you can try  to accept and see if everything is working.
if not then it's not iptables but other issue.

and also i do thing that in your case i would consider to also put a WEB PROXY such as squid.

thanks for the reply, i forgotten to set the return routes for the traffic

 # Generated by ip6tables-save v1.4.4 on Wed Apr  6 02:34:33 2011
  *filter
  :INPUT DROP [2:160]
  :FORWARD DROP [0:0]
  :OUTPUT DROP [3:232]
   
  #----------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Allow ssh INPUT
  #----------------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A INPUT -p tcp -m tcp --sport 22 -j ACCEPT
  -A INPUT -p tcp -m tcp --dport 22 -j ACCEPT
   
  #------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Allow internal router connect morgaine 
  #------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A INPUT -p tcp -m tcp --dport 9999 -j ACCEPT
  -A INPUT -p tcp -m tcp --sport 9999 -j ACCEPT
   
  #------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Allow ping6 and ospf
  #-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A INPUT -p ipv6-icmp -j ACCEPT
  -A INPUT -p ospf -j ACCEPT
   
  #-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Allow request into dhcp server port 
  #-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A INPUT -p udp -m udp --sport 547 -j ACCEPT
  -A INPUT -p udp -m udp --dport 547 -j ACCEPT
  -A INPUT -p udp -m udp --sport 546 -j ACCEPT
  -A INPUT -p udp -m udp --dport 547 -j ACCEPT
  #------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Allow internal input dns
  #------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A INPUT -p udp -m udp --sport 53 -j ACCEPT
   
  #-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Allow ssh
  #-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A FORWARD -p tcp -m tcp --dport 22 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -p tcp -m tcp --sport 22 -j ACCEPT
   
  #------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # ALLOW www and https
  #------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A FORWARD -p tcp -m tcp --dport 80 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -p tcp -m tcp --sport 80 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -p tcp -m tcp --dport 443 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -p tcp -m tcp --sport 443 -j ACCEPT
   
  #-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Allow web server conmmunication with sql server
  #-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A FORWARD -s 2402:ec00:ffe5:1::3/128 -d 2402:ec00:ffe5:3::3/128 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 3306 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -s 2402:ec00:ffe5:3::3/128 -d 2402:ec00:ffe5:1::3/128 -p tcp -m tcp --sport 3306 -j ACCEPT
   
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Allow forward to dns
  #----------------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A FORWARD -d 2402:ec00:ffe5:1::2/128 -p udp -m udp --dport 53 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -s 2402:ec00:ffe5:1::2/128 -p udp -m udp --sport 53 -j ACCEPT
   
  #------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # ALLOW smtp port for mail relay and mail server send mail
  #------------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A FORWARD -d 2402:ec00:ffe5:1::4/128 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 25 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -s 2402:ec00:ffe5:1::4/128 -p tcp -m tcp --sport 25 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -s 2402:ec00:ffe5:1::4/128 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 25 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -d 2402:ec00:ffe5:1::4/128 -p tcp -m tcp --sport 25 -j ACCEPT

  -A FORWARD -s 2402:ec00:ffe5:3::2/128 -p tcp -m tcp --sport 25 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -s 2402:ec00:ffe5:3::2/128 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 25 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -d 2402:ec00:ffe5:3::2/128 -p tcp -m tcp --sport 25 -j ACCEPT
   
  #-----------------------------------------------------------------------
  #
  #----------------------------------------------------------------------
   
  -A FORWARD -s 2402:ec00:ffe5:1::4/128 -d 2402:ec00:ffe5:3::2/128 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 24 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -s 2402:ec00:ffe5:3::2/128 -d 2402:ec00:ffe5:1::4/128 -p tcp -m tcp --sport 24 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -s 2402:ec00:ffe5:2::/128 -d 2402:ec00:ffe5:3::2/128 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 24 -j ACCEPT

  #-------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Allow ping6 and ospf
  #-----------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A FORWARD -p ipv6-icmp -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -p ospf -j ACCEPT
   
  #----------------------------------------------------------------------
  # open imap port for mail relay and mail server
  #----------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A FORWARD -d 2402:ec00:ffe5:3::2/128 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 143 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -s 2402:ec00:ffe5:3::2/128 -p tcp -m tcp --sport 143 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -d 2402:ec00:ffe5:1::4/128 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 143 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -s 2402:ec00:ffe5:1::4/128 -p tcp -m tcp --sport 143 -j ACCEPT
   
  #-------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Allow forward connection to morgaine
  #-----------------------------------------------------------------
  -A FORWARD -p tcp -m tcp --dport 9999 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -p tcp -m tcp --sport 9999 -j ACCEPT
   
  #------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Open ssh
  #-------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A OUTPUT -p tcp -m tcp --dport 22 -j ACCEPT
  -A OUTPUT -p tcp -m tcp --sport 22 -j ACCEPT
  -A OUTPUT -p tcp -m tcp --sport 9999 -j ACCEPT
  -A OUTPUT -p tcp -m tcp --dport 9999 -j ACCEPT
   
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Allow dns
  #-------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A OUTPUT -p udp -m udp --dport 53 -j ACCEPT
   
  #-------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Allow dhcp cliet
  #------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A OUTPUT -p udp -m udp --sport 547 -j ACCEPT
  -A OUTPUT -p udp -m udp --dport 547 -j ACCEPT
  -A OUTPUT -p udp -m udp --sport 546 -j ACCEPT
  -A OUTPUT -p udp -m udp --dport 546 -j ACCEPT
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Allow ping6 and ospf
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A OUTPUT -p ipv6-icmp -j ACCEPT
  -A OUTPUT -p ospf -j ACCEPT 
   
   
   
  COMMIT

 # Generated by ip6tables-save v1.4.4 on Wed Apr  6 02:02:21 2011
  *filter
  :INPUT DROP [6:480]
  :FORWARD DROP [0:0]
  :OUTPUT DROP [6:480]
   
  #----------------------------------------------------------------------------
  #Allow ssh in and out border router
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A INPUT -p tcp -m tcp --dport 22 -j ACCEPT 
  -A INPUT -p tcp -m tcp --sport 22 -j ACCEPT 
   
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  #Allow connect to morgaine for update
  #----------------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A INPUT -p tcp -m tcp --sport 9999 -j ACCEPT
  -A INPUT -p tcp -m tcp --dport 9999 -j ACCEPT
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  #Allow external dns input our dns
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A INPUT -p udp -m udp --sport 53 -j ACCEPT
   
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  #Allow icmp and ospf
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A INPUT -p ipv6-icmp -j ACCEPT 
  -A INPUT -p ospf -j ACCEPT 
   
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  #Allow BGP
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A INPUT -p tcp -m tcp --sport 179 -j ACCEPT 
   
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  #Allow forward icmp and ospf for servers
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A FORWARD -p ipv6-icmp -j ACCEPT 
  -A FORWARD -p ospf -j ACCEPT 
   
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  #Aoow forward internal dns and external dns
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A FORWARD -s 2402:ec00:ffe5:1::2/128 -p udp -m udp --dport 53 -j ACCEPT

  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  #Allow connect to morgaine
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A FORWARD -p tcp -m tcp --dport 9999 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -p tcp -m tcp --sport 9999 -j ACCEPT
   
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  #Allow mail relay send and recieve mail
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A FORWARD -d 2402:ec00:ffe5:1::4/128 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 25 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -s 2402:ec00:ffe5:1::4/128 -p tcp -m tcp --sport 25 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -s 2402:ec00:ffe5:1::4/128 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 25 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -d 2402:ec00:ffe5:1::4/128 -p tcp -m tcp --sport 25 -j ACCEPT
   
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  #Allow forward  mail and IMAP
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------- 
  -A FORWARD -d 2402:ec00:ffe5:1::4/128 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 143 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -s 2402:ec00:ffe5:1::4/128 -p tcp -m tcp --sport 143 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -d 2402:ec00:ffe5:1::4/128 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 24 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -s 2402:ec00:ffe5:1::4/128 -p tcp -m tcp --sport 24 -j ACCEPT
   
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  #Allow mail server send and recieve mail
  #-------------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A FORWARD -d 2402:ec00:ffe5:3::2/128 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 25 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -s 2402:ec00:ffe5:3::2/128 -p tcp -m tcp --sport 25 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -s 2402:ec00:ffe5:3::2/128 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 25 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -d 2402:ec00:ffe5:3::2/128 -p tcp -m tcp --sport 25 -j ACCEPT
   
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Open www and https for internal 
  #-------------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A FORWARD -p tcp -m tcp --dport 80 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -p tcp -m tcp --sport 80 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -p tcp -m tcp --dport 443 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -p tcp -m tcp --sport 443 -j ACCEPT
   
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Allow border router ssh others and forward ssh
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A FORWARD -p tcp -m tcp --dport 22 -j ACCEPT
  -A FORWARD -p tcp -m tcp --sport 22 -j ACCEPT
  -A OUTPUT -p tcp -m tcp --sport 22 -j ACCEPT 
  -A OUTPUT -p tcp -m tcp --dport 22 -j ACCEPT 
   
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  #Allow connet to morgaine to update

  -A OUTPUT -p tcp -m tcp --dport 9999 -j ACCEPT
  -A OUTPUT -p tcp -m tcp --sport 9999 -j ACCEPT
  #-------------------------------------------------------------------------
  #allow icmp and ospf
  #-------------------------------------------------------------------------
  -A OUTPUT -p ipv6-icmp -j ACCEPT
